title: Episode 1
overview: Ozu, a despicable prankster, spills cola on the remote control to the dorm's only air conditioner.

title: Episode 2
overview: "I" and friends team up to use a time machine to retrieve the AC remote control before it breaks.

title: Episode 3
overview: Akashi and "I" travel back in time to restore order to the universe but run into unexpected trouble.

title: Episode 4
overview: Back to square one. Akashi and "I" must once again try to save the universe from destruction.

title: Episode 5
overview: Akashi has a plan, and "I" catches on. Can they escape the maddening cycle of one-day time travel?

title: Episode 6
overview: As a university freshman, "I" joins a club dedicated to fantasizing about a fictional railway.
